chapter_context.summary: Moses' final prophetic blessing upon the tribes of Israel.

outline.explanation: This section focuses on Introduction to the Blessing (33:1-5), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Deuteronomy.
This section focuses on Blessings on the Tribes (33:6-25), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Deuteronomy.
This section focuses on Conclusion: The Happiness of Israel (33:26-29), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Deuteronomy.

key_themes.title: Covenant Loyalty
key_themes.description: The requirement to love and obey God from the heart.

key_themes.title: Remembrance
key_themes.description: The importance of recalling God's acts to maintain faith.

devotional.question: How can we 'circumcise our hearts' today as Moses commanded the Israelites?
What blessings have you seen in your life as a result of choosing obedience?

cultural_historical.title: The Second Law
cultural_historical.text: Deuteronomy is not a new law but a 're-iteration' (deutero-nomos) for the generation about to enter the land.
